Live the unexpected without improvising. We design your trip

benefitsSteps.title: stress-free and flexible
benefitsSteps.description: You say how much you want to spend and when; with options and filters to tailor the surprise to you. We take care of the rest.

benefitsSteps.title: authentic discovery

howItWorksSteps.title: PLAN

howItWorksSteps.title: GET THE SURPRISE
howItWorksSteps.description: Confirm your trip. We reveal the destination 48 hours before and send you the guide for that mood.

howItWorksSteps.title: TRAVEL STRESS-FREE
howItWorksSteps.description: Pack your bags. Flights and accommodation ready; human support when you need it.

substeps.title: TRAVEL TYPE
substeps.description: From solo getaways to group, family, pet-friendly trips or honeymoon.

substeps.title: EXPERIENCE
substeps.description: The only thing you define here is the per-person budget for travel and accommodation. That's your ceiling. We take care of the rest.

substeps.title: WHAT'S THE REASON FOR MY TRIP
substeps.description: We travel for many reasons—what's driving you today?

substeps.title: ORIGIN
substeps.description: Choose country and city of departure.

substeps.title: DATES
substeps.description: Choose number of days and start date. Weekend or flexible.

substeps.title: TRANSPORT
substeps.description: Set your preferred order of transport options by dragging.

substeps.title: FILTERS
substeps.description: Preferred times, weather, destinations to avoid, max travel time, transport type.

options.label: Hotel Style
options.tooltip: Classic & Comfort. Comfort, cleanliness and 24-hour services. Ideal if you want to be looked after.

options.label: Home Style
options.tooltip: Live like a local. Apartments or private homes to set your own pace, cook and feel at home.

options.label: Nature Escape
options.tooltip: Total disconnection. Cabins or lodges immersed in nature, away from the noise and close to fresh air.

options.label: Hybrid Hub
options.tooltip: Social & Work. The middle ground between community, design and co-working spaces. Perfect for digital nomads.

options.label: Glamping
options.tooltip: Chic Adventure. The magic of camping under the stars, with the comfort and style of a premium hotel.

excuses.title: Solo Adventure

footer.tagline: Where the routine ends, the adventure begins.

cta.buttonAriaLabel: Go to 'Start your Journey' section with 'By Traveller' tab selected
cta.subtitle: Start with a feelings brief. It takes 3 minutes.
cta.title: Ready to let go of control and gain freedom?

items.bio: Designs itineraries that connect with the local: workshops, shared tables and authentic rituals.
items.name: Ana García

items.bio: Finds the sweet spot between adrenaline and safety. Trekking, open skies and controlled micro-challenges.
items.name: Carlos Mendoza

items.bio: Curates spaces with design, calm and mindfulness. Silence, spa, low music, impeccable service.
items.name: Sofía Rossi

items.q: What exactly am I buying if the destination is a surprise?
items.a: You're buying an emotional outcome: relief from choice and guided discovery. Destination and logistics stay in our hands (with your limits clear).
Risk assessment per destination, verified partners, coverage and 24/7 communication protocols.
Yes. The brief defines no-go's. At destination, we keep flexibility without breaking the trip narrative.

items.q: What if I don't like the surprise?
items.a: We iterate. We take your feedback and adjust for the next one. Our NPS and repeat rate guide improvement.

founder.p1: We were born to fight the analysis paralysis that holds back great trips. We turn the what if…? into let's go! with a system that protects your time and energy.
founder.p2: This isn't just an agency: it's a manifesto against routine and for well-designed wonder.

hero.ctaPrimaryAriaLabel: Go to 'Start your Journey' section with 'By Traveller' tab selected
hero.description: Luxury isn't choosing among 500 options. It's not having to choose. We design safe serendipity so you live what matters.
hero.subtitle: Architecture of trust
hero.title: Architecture of trust

meta.description: Learn about the philosophy, founder story and curating team behind Randomtrip. Designed serendipity with safety and impeccable taste.
meta.openGraphDescription: Learn about the philosophy, founder story and curating team behind Randomtrip.
meta.openGraphTitle: About us | Randomtrip — Architecture of trust
meta.title: About us | Randomtrip — Architecture of trust

philosophy.p1: We don't sell a destination; we sell an emotional outcome. Our mission is to free your mind from analysis paralysis and guide you toward states like wonder, calm or connection.
philosophy.p2: We call it Designed Serendipity: safe, meticulously planned environments that feel spontaneous and transformative. You give up logistical control to gain real freedom.

items.title: Feelings brief
items.description: How you want to feel. Soft/hard boundaries. Red and green signals.

items.title: Invisible design
items.description: We handle the logistics. You just receive signals and moments.

items.title: Safe serendipity
items.description: Curated surprises with backup and plan B. Freedom with a net.

trust.footnote: * Brand plan targets. We'll update live metrics on the dashboard.

items.title: Expert curation
items.copy: Guides with impeccable taste and our own methodology. Less scroll, more living.

items.title: Safety and transparency
items.copy: Protocols, audited partners and clear communication before, during and after.

items.title: Tripper community
items.copy: Real stories, referrals and shared learnings that elevate every trip.

notFound.tipText: Did you know our trippers have visited over 50 countries? Discover their unique experiences!
